title: Chapter 1037 Kulas(3)
content:
Chapter 1037 Kulas(3)

"No… There's nothing wrong…" The ladies in the room responded to Xiao Hua's question with a somewhat rosy face.

Three days later, Yuan opened his eyes when Kulas came out of the building.

"What are you doing? Get out of there and fight me! I'm ready for our rematch!" Kulas said to him.

"Alright. Give me a moment." Yuan jumped out of the small pond and got dressed before going to stand in front of Kulas.

"Ready?" Kulas asked with a confident smile on his face.

'His aura has improved tremendously in just three days. I reckon that he's at least 30 percent stronger than before…' Yuan thought to himself after seeing Kulas' aura that made it seem as though the space around him was distorting.

However, it was not just Kulas who had improved over the past three days.

Yuan's physique also experienced significant improvements after tempering himself in the clear water.

"Then let's go!" Kulas suddenly stepped forward and punched his fist at Yuan.

Yuan immediately activated Golden Mountain Body Refinement and stood still, letting Kulas hit him directly in his chest.

A ripple swept the air after the impact, and Yuan could feel his muscles screaming in pain, but he endured it and retaliated with his own fist.

The way they fought each other was the exact same as before. It was more of an endurance challenge than a proper fight, but neither of them complained.

Kulas enjoyed fighting like this as it got his blood pumping with excitement. As for Yuan, he couldn't ask for a better training partner. His body would become studier, more refined, and stronger with every strike, so he had no reason to complain.

After a hundred strikes, Kulas suddenly roared, and his body grew slightly larger.

'This is!' Yuan's eyes widened with surprise after seeing Kulas' sudden transformation.

A wide smile appeared on Kulas' face as he sent his fist flying at Yuan.

Yuan, who had no intention of avoiding the strike, could feel an immense pressure coming from Kulas' fist.

"Ah!"

Yuan cried out in pain for the first time when his right arm was sent flying by Kulas' attack.

"Yuan!"

"Young Master!"

"Brother Yuan!"

The ladies in the spectators' room exclaimed when they saw Yuan's entire arm fly off his shoulder after being struck by Kulas, their faces turned pale, as they have never seen Yuan suffering such a grievous wound before except the time when he was in the Mystic Realm.

Yuan jumped back to gain some distance from Kulas, who remained standing there with a smile on his face.

He glanced at his severed arm that had fallen several meters away before turning to look at the injury on his body.

'What a powerful punch!' Yuan swallowed nervously as he blocked his injury with his spiritual energy, preventing any more blood loss.

Kulas suddenly started laughing, "Hahaha! How do you like my—"

However, before he could even finish his sentence, Yuan's Perfect Regeneration kicked in, growing him a new arm within seconds.

Kulas stared at Yuan with his eyes as wide as saucers.

"What the fuck did you just do?! How did you just—?! Are you even human?!" Kulas exclaimed in a shocked voice while pointing at Yuan.

"Of course I am human. What about you? Is that the Great Mammoth Body Refinement that I have heard about?" Yuan said with a smile on his face.

"So you already knew about this technique… That's right. I am currently using the Great Mammoth Body Refinement. It not only allows me to alter my body size, it even boosts my strength by a tremendous amount. As long as I am in this state, you won't be able to take a hit from me! I won this match, Tian Yang!"

"Keep dreaming. The match isn't decided just yet!"

Yuan rushed at Kulas after fully recovering from his injury.

After tanking Yuan's hit, Kulas swung back.

However, to his surprise, Yuan didn't avoid his attack like he'd anticipated. In fact, Yuan did the complete opposite by blocking the attack with his own fist.

"Agh!"

Yuan gritted his teeth when he felt his muscles tearing apart and all of the bones in his arm shatter, and in the midst of Kulas' shock, Yuan used his other arm to strike back.

Kulas retreated several steps afterward.

"Hahahaha! As expected of my rival! You're full of surprises, Tian Yang!" Kulas laughed like a maniac as he rushed at Yuan again.

Several hours later, Kulas knelt on the bloodied ground with a look of disbelief on his face.

"You're a freaking monster, Tian Yang…" he muttered in a low voice.

"I can say the same to you, Kulas." Yuan said with a smile on his face, but his entire body was soaked in blood, looking as if he'd just taken a dip in a bath of blood.

"It's not over yet, Tian Yang! One more match! I have a feeling that I will be able to defeat you in the next match!" Kulas glared at him with a confident gaze.

"Sure." Yuan nodded.

"Seven days! I will see you in seven days!" Kulas slowly stood back up before limping towards the building.

Once Kulas disappeared inside the building, Yuan immediately entered the pond and began cultivating.

Five days later, Yuan opened his eyes and turned to look at the building with a frown on his face.

Even though Kulas was still inside the house, his aura had grown to the point where it was leaking out of the building.

'This isn't good. At this rate, he'll definitely defeat me during our third match." Yuan sighed inwardly.

However, there was no way for him to significantly increase his strength in the next two days.

'If I want to defeat Kulas in two days, I will need to use the golden aura.'

Unfortunately, he still doesn't have the capability to use the golden aura at will.

'Looks like I will have to force it to come out…' Yuan swallowed nervously after recalling how painful it was afterward.

However, he didn't have any choice.

Thus, after mentally preparing himself, Yuan activated the nameless technique.
